questions.text: Which of the following are matter?
questions.explanation: Matter is anything that occupies space and has mass. Chair and almonds are solids, air is a gas. Love and thought are emotions/thoughts, not matter.

questions.text: The smell of hot sizzling food reaches you several metres away, but to get the smell from cold food you have to go close because:
options: Particles move faster at higher temperature
questions.correctAnswer: Particles move faster at higher temperature
questions.explanation: At higher temperatures, particles have more kinetic energy and diffuse faster. This is why the smell of hot food travels farther.

questions.text: Particles of matter are continuously moving.
questions.explanation: Particles of matter are always in motion. This is evidenced by diffusion and Brownian motion. The speed of motion increases with temperature.

questions.text: The process of a liquid changing into vapour at any temperature below its boiling point is called ________.
questions.explanation: Evaporation is the process where a liquid changes to vapour at any temperature below its boiling point. It causes cooling.
